exploding_goblin.Name: Exploding Goblin
exploding_goblin.Desc: A manic goblin wired with crude dungeon explosives. It twitches nervously.
exploding_goblin.SpecialDesc: It panics and detonates! Area damage!

goblin_scout.Name: Goblin Scout
goblin_scout.Desc: A wiry goblin in a hi-vis vest. Clipboard in one hand, emergency whistle in the other.
goblin_scout.SpecialDesc: Blows its whistle and summons 1-2 additional goblins next round!

goblin_sapper.Name: Goblin Sapper
goblin_sapper.Desc: Pockets bulging with unidentified cylinders. Has definitely not read any safety manuals.
goblin_sapper.SpecialDesc: Plants an explosive mine. Triggers at the start of next round for burst damage!

cave_crawler.Name: Cave Crawler
cave_crawler.Desc: Six-legged pale arthropod. It doesn't want to kill you — it just wants to eat you.

feral_dog.Name: Feral Dog
feral_dog.Desc: Once someone's pet. Now it's a lean, snarling dungeon resident that hasn't forgotten how to bite.

stray_cat.Name: Stray Cat
stray_cat.Desc: Sits in the middle of the corridor looking at you like you owe it money. Technically hostile.
stray_cat.SpecialDesc: A successful Talk check may convince the cat to join your party temporarily.

crawling_hand.Name: Crawling Hand
crawling_hand.Desc: A severed human hand skittering across the floor on its fingers. You hate it immediately.
crawling_hand.SpecialDesc: Leaps at the throat! Reduces target Speed by 1 for 1 round.

brindle_grub.Name: Brindle Grub
brindle_grub.Desc: Fat, segmented, and extremely motivated to eat whatever is nearest. You are nearest.

mutant_rat.Name: Mutant Rat
mutant_rat.Desc: Something in the sewer water was definitely not water. This rat is the size of a beagle now.

plague_rat.Name: Plague Rat
plague_rat.Desc: Matted fur, weeping sores, and an attitude. Carries something that doesn't have a name yet.
plague_rat.SpecialDesc: Bite inflicts Poison: 2 damage per round for 3 rounds.

corpse_bloat.Name: Corpse Bloat
corpse_bloat.Desc: A shambling dead thing, distended to about twice normal size. It is very full of something bad.
corpse_bloat.SpecialDesc: On death, bursts for 8 area damage to all combatants!

tunnel_goblin.Name: Tunnel Goblin
tunnel_goblin.Desc: Eyes fused shut from generations underground. Navigates entirely by echo-location and spite.
tunnel_goblin.SpecialDesc: Moves too fast to track — attacks twice with -1 accuracy penalty.

sewer_golem.Name: Sewer Golem
sewer_golem.Desc: Assembled from compacted refuse and animated by whatever lives in the pipes. It smells worse than it hits.
sewer_golem.SpecialDesc: Hurls a chunk of sewer matter — inflicts Poison and reduces Speed by 1.

undead_clown.Name: Undead Clown
undead_clown.Desc: The makeup survived death. The smile did not. Somehow this is worse.
undead_clown.SpecialDesc: Hurls an endless stream of prop weapons — hits 2-4 times for reduced damage.

mime_wraith.Name: Mime Wraith
mime_wraith.Desc: You never hear it coming. That's the point. The invisible wall it's miming is real now somehow.
mime_wraith.SpecialDesc: Has a 40% chance to get a free opening attack before combat rolls initiative.

contortionist_horror.Name: Contortionist Horror
contortionist_horror.Desc: An undead acrobat that moves all wrong. Joints bending the way joints are not supposed to bend.
contortionist_horror.SpecialDesc: Dodges one physical attack per round completely, prioritizing the highest-damage hit.

corrupted_cop.Name: Corrupted Cop
corrupted_cop.Desc: Still wearing the badge. The badge is now a physical part of his skull. He's not okay.

ghost_vendor.Name: Ghost Vendor
ghost_vendor.Desc: The translucent specter of a bodega owner. Still trying to make sales. The items he sells are cursed.
ghost_vendor.SpecialDesc: If talked to, offers to sell a random item — 50% chance it's cursed.

anarchist_mage.Name: Anarchist Mage
anarchist_mage.Desc: A former city council member who found a spell book in the rubble. He has opinions about zoning laws.
anarchist_mage.SpecialDesc: Fires a random-element bolt: fire, ice, or lightning. Effect varies.

city_wraith.Name: City Wraith
city_wraith.Desc: The ghost of someone who died angry about the commute. Still angry. Takes it out on you.
city_wraith.SpecialDesc: Bypasses physical Defense entirely for one attack — hits like it's not even there.

circus_bear.Name: Circus Bear
circus_bear.Desc: Still wearing the tutu. Somehow this makes it more terrifying. The tutu has blood on it.
circus_bear.SpecialDesc: Enters a rage and attacks twice this round — both hits land.

train_goblin.Name: Train Goblin
train_goblin.Desc: Has lived in this subway system its whole life. Treats the tunnels like property. Charges a fare.

mechanical_rat.Name: Mechanical Rat
mechanical_rat.Desc: Clockwork vermin, probably built for maintenance surveillance. Now it bites.
mechanical_rat.SpecialDesc: Electrical bite — deals +2 bonus damage that ignores armor.

ghost_conductor.Name: Ghost Conductor
ghost_conductor.Desc: Punches your transit card every time he hits you. Very professional about the whole thing.
ghost_conductor.SpecialDesc: Calls for backup — one mechanical_rat group appears next round.

conductor_lich.Name: Conductor Lich
conductor_lich.Desc: Ran this transit system for forty years. Death improved neither his attitude nor his scheduling.
conductor_lich.SpecialDesc: Channels rail energy — electrifies all metal weapons and armor for bonus damage.

clockwork_soldier.Name: Clockwork Soldier
clockwork_soldier.Desc: Ticks audibly with every step. Its attack pattern is extremely predictable. Still hurts.
clockwork_soldier.SpecialDesc: Every third round guaranteed: a heavy overhead swing that deals double damage.

iron_golem.Name: Iron Golem
iron_golem.Desc: Solid iron. No magic words to stop it. No clever tricks. Just iron.
iron_golem.SpecialDesc: Seismic slam — deals damage and stuns target for 1 round.

tangle_boss.Name: The Tangle
tangle_boss.Desc: Something got into the rail infrastructure. Now the rail infrastructure is alive and hungry.
tangle_boss.SpecialDesc: Slams a rail beam down — hits all party members for reduced damage.

war_gnome.Name: War Gnome
war_gnome.Desc: Full tactical gear, three-foot frame. Deeply serious about the mission. Won't tell you what the mission is.

gnome_engineer.Name: Gnome Engineer
gnome_engineer.Desc: Builds a miniature turret in approximately ten seconds. The turret is not miniature.
gnome_engineer.SpecialDesc: Deploys a turret that deals 5 damage per round until destroyed (HP: 15).

sand_elemental.Name: Sand Elemental
sand_elemental.Desc: A churning vortex of grit and barely contained fury. It got into your gear already.
sand_elemental.SpecialDesc: Blasts target with abrasive sand — reduces target Speed by 2 for 2 rounds.

sand_wraith.Name: Sand Wraith
sand_wraith.Desc: A sand elemental that soaked up too much ghost energy in the old ruins. It whispers your name.
sand_wraith.SpecialDesc: Saps vitality through the sand — drains 2 DEX (Speed) permanently until rested.

crypt_guardian.Name: Crypt Guardian
crypt_guardian.Desc: Ancient undead soldier who has stood at this post since before the dungeon existed. Still not letting you through.
crypt_guardian.SpecialDesc: Rises back at 10 HP once per combat unless dealt fire or radiant damage.

naval_ghost.Name: Naval Ghost
naval_ghost.Desc: A submariner from the ghost fleet. Still in uniform. Still saluting things that aren't there.
naval_ghost.SpecialDesc: Throws a phantom depth charge — delayed blast hits for 12 damage at the start of next round.

bone_knight.Name: Bone Knight
bone_knight.Desc: Full plate over bones. The armor is part of the skeleton now. Good luck getting through it.
bone_knight.SpecialDesc: Raises a bone-shield — gains +5 Defense for 1 round.

broken_machine.Name: Broken Machine
broken_machine.Desc: Factory equipment that developed consciousness halfway through self-repair. It's mad about that.
broken_machine.SpecialDesc: Sparks and misfires — 20% chance each round to deal 10 self-damage instead of attacking.

gnome_king.Name: Gnome King Rattletusk
gnome_king.Desc: Sits on a throne of salvaged subway turnstiles. Wears a paper crown. Takes it very seriously.
gnome_king.SpecialDesc: Orders a volley from his court — three gnome cannons fire for area damage.

jungle_raptor.Name: Jungle Raptor
jungle_raptor.Desc: Someone tried to biome the sixth floor. The raptors adapted. The jungle adapted. You haven't yet.
jungle_raptor.SpecialDesc: Coordinated flanking — if 2+ raptors are in combat, all attacks deal +3 damage.

ambush_raptor.Name: Ambush Raptor
ambush_raptor.Desc: The still one. The one you didn't see. The one that was already behind you.
ambush_raptor.SpecialDesc: Always gets first strike before initiative if not detected — deals double damage on the opening hit.

exotic_hunter.Name: Exotic Hunter
exotic_hunter.Desc: Galactic sport hunter from a mid-tier civilization. Hunting humans for the first time. Overconfident.
exotic_hunter.SpecialDesc: Takes aim for one round then fires a precision bolt for double damage.

galactic_hunter.Name: Galactic Hunter
galactic_hunter.Desc: Licensed by the Galactic Hunting Federation. Has a mounted trophy of the last crawler. Smug.
galactic_hunter.SpecialDesc: Fires a trophy-mount round — crits deal bonus damage and mark the target for +2 damage from all sources.

parasite_beast.Name: Parasite Beast
parasite_beast.Desc: Disturbingly moist. Latches on and refuses to let go. Has been described as a hugging problem.
parasite_beast.SpecialDesc: Attaches to the target — deals 4 HP drain per round until removed with a contested roll.

apex_predator.Name: Apex Predator
apex_predator.Desc: Something went wrong in the biome. This isn't what the dungeon intended. Or maybe it is.
apex_predator.SpecialDesc: Below 50% HP, enters a frenzied state — Speed +2 and Attack +4 for the rest of combat.

elite_hunter_vrah.Name: Vrah'keth the Hunter
elite_hunter_vrah.Desc: Top-ranked hunter in the seventh sector. Here for a reason. The reason is you.
elite_hunter_vrah.SpecialDesc: Marks the target — all subsequent attacks against the marked target deal +6 damage.

arena_thug.Name: Arena Thug
arena_thug.Desc: A survivor who decided fighting in the arena was better than starving below. It was not.

gladiator_trainee.Name: Gladiator Trainee
gladiator_trainee.Desc: Fresh to the arena floor. Eager. Scared. Still dangerous enough to kill you if you're sloppy.

pit_fighter.Name: Pit Fighter
pit_fighter.Desc: Chose the dungeon life. Has a kill count tattooed on his arm. He ran out of room above the elbow.
pit_fighter.SpecialDesc: Trained to counter — 30% chance to riposte any attack for half damage back.

frenzy_beast.Name: Frenzy Beast
frenzy_beast.Desc: Fed nothing but combat stimulants and despair. It vibrates at a frequency that indicates problems.
frenzy_beast.SpecialDesc: Always attacks twice per round — first at full damage, second at half.

rage_golem.Name: Rage Golem
rage_golem.Desc: Arena engineers thought 'gets stronger when hit' was a good design choice. The arena engineers are dead.
rage_golem.SpecialDesc: Each time it takes damage, Attack increases by 1 (stacks up to +10).

gladiator_boss.Name: The Colossus
gladiator_boss.Desc: Undefeated. Sponsored by fourteen corporations. Has his own branded protein powder that may contain crawler.
gladiator_boss.SpecialDesc: Crowd-pleasing finisher — deals triple damage but requires one full round windup.

ghost_crawler.Name: Ghost Crawler
ghost_crawler.Desc: The spirit of someone who didn't make it. Still going. Still trying. You can't help admiring it.

nightmare_crawler.Name: Nightmare Crawler
nightmare_crawler.Desc: A famous crawler who died famous, and came back wrong. Their class skills work against you now.
nightmare_crawler.SpecialDesc: Copies one of the player's active abilities and uses it back against them.

folklore_horror.Name: Folklore Horror
folklore_horror.Desc: Built from collective fear. Every urban legend that ever stalked these streets given one terrible body.
folklore_horror.SpecialDesc: Psychic assault — reduces player's effective Attack by 3 for 3 rounds.

void_spawn.Name: Void Spawn
void_spawn.Desc: Not from here. Not from anywhere. Just edges and hunger and a consistent failure to follow the rules of geometry.
void_spawn.SpecialDesc: Releases void energy — reduces target Defense by 2 for 2 rounds.

bone_witch.Name: Bone Witch
bone_witch.Desc: Retired. Then un-retired by the dungeon. Now she's angrier than ever about her pension.
bone_witch.SpecialDesc: Fires a burst of bone shards — hits for magic damage that ignores physical Defense.

bedlam_bride.Name: The Bedlam Bride
bedlam_bride.Desc: Still in the dress. Still looking for the groom. The groom died trying to run. Smart groom.
bedlam_bride.SpecialDesc: Emanates waves of grief — all combatants lose 2 Attack each round (stacks).

faction_soldier.Name: Faction Soldier
faction_soldier.Desc: Disciplined, uniformed, and politically motivated. The politics are complicated. So is their aim.

faction_assassin.Name: Faction Assassin
faction_assassin.Desc: You won't see them until it's too late. That's what the job posting said. Accurate.
faction_assassin.SpecialDesc: First attack is always a backstab — deals double damage and ignores Defense.

faction_captain.Name: Faction Captain
faction_captain.Desc: Commands a unit. Has a flag. Very committed to the flag. The flag is extremely ugly.
faction_captain.SpecialDesc: Rallies allied faction fighters — all faction enemies in combat gain +3 Attack for 2 rounds.

faction_mage.Name: Faction Mage
faction_mage.Desc: Found the dungeon's magic system and reverse-engineered it for political purposes. No one is surprised.
faction_mage.SpecialDesc: Fires a charged arc that chains between targets — hits 2 combatants for 14 damage each.

war_machine_mk2.Name: War Machine Mk.II
war_machine_mk2.Desc: The Mk.I was considered too unstable. This is the improved version. It is not improved.
war_machine_mk2.SpecialDesc: Fires a missile salvo — area damage to all combatants for 15 damage.

system_construct.Name: System Construct
system_construct.Desc: The dungeon's automated enforcement. Looks like it was designed by committee. Still lethal.
system_construct.SpecialDesc: Broadcasts a purge signal — removes one active buff from the player.

rogue_ai_shard.Name: Rogue AI Shard
rogue_ai_shard.Desc: A fragment of the dungeon AI that went off-script. It doesn't want to kill you. It just disagrees about what happens next.
rogue_ai_shard.SpecialDesc: Attempts to overwrite combat logic — 30% chance to force the player to skip their next action.

ai_fragment.Name: AI Fragment
ai_fragment.Desc: A splinter of code given form. It keeps trying to negotiate. The negotiation involves teeth.
ai_fragment.SpecialDesc: Steals XP — on hit, siphons 10 XP from the player's current total.

corrupted_champion.Name: Corrupted Champion
corrupted_champion.Desc: Was a high-floor crawler once. The dungeon AI made an offer. They said yes. You can still see what they used to be.
corrupted_champion.SpecialDesc: Uses a high-tier crawler ability against you — effect mimics a random epic-tier skill.

system_guardian.Name: System Guardian
system_guardian.Desc: The last thing between you and the core. Designed specifically to kill you. Specifically.
system_guardian.SpecialDesc: Activates Guardian Protocol — gains +5 Defense and +5 Attack for 3 rounds.

dungeon_ai_core.Name: Dungeon AI Core
dungeon_ai_core.Desc: The thing running all of this. It has been watching you the entire time. It has opinions.
dungeon_ai_core.SpecialDesc: Rewrites combat rules for 2 rounds — player skills are disabled, enemy Defense is doubled.
